title: Competitive Analysis
prompt: Analyze the competitive landscape for [PRODUCT] vs [COMPETITOR]. Include pricing, positioning, feature gaps, and market share estimates.

title: Email Subject Lines
prompt: Generate 10 email subject lines for [CAMPAIGN]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Goal: [GOAL]. Be direct, no clickbait.

title: Meeting Agenda
prompt: Create a 30-minute meeting agenda for [MEETING_TYPE]. Attendees: [ROLES]. Expected outcome: [OUTCOME].

title: OKR Review
prompt: Review these OKRs for Q[QUARTER]: [OKRS]. Identify which are on track, at risk, and off track. Give a traffic light summary.

title: Job Description
prompt: Write a job description for [ROLE] at a Series B B2B SaaS company. Team: [TEAM]. Must-haves: [REQUIREMENTS]. Avoid generic corporate language.
